name: Quantity and Composition of Domestic Solid Waste in Kampala City

creator.affiliation: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
creator.name: Musa Manga

description: Domestic solid waste generation and composition data for 103 households in Kampala City, Uganda, collected over a seven-day measurement campaign in three parishes representing different income levels (Bwaise I, low income; Bukoto I, middle income; Ggaba, high income), together with household socio-economic characteristics.

spatialCoverage.name: Kampala City, Uganda; parishes Bwaise I (Kawempe Division), Bukoto I (Nakawa Division), and Ggaba (Makindye Division)

variableMeasured.name: id
variableMeasured.description: Package-level unique household identifier (1-103), following the row numbering of the All_data sheet in the raw workbook (Bwaise I, then Bukoto I, then Ggaba).

variableMeasured.name: household_id
variableMeasured.description: Household label as recorded on the area sheet (for example Household_7); values repeat across parishes and contain gaps, so id is the unique key.

variableMeasured.name: division
variableMeasured.description: Kampala City division the household is located in (Kawempe, Makindye, or Nakawa).

variableMeasured.name: parish
variableMeasured.description: Study parish the household is located in (Bwaise I = low income, Bukoto I = middle income, Ggaba = high income area).

variableMeasured.name: zone
variableMeasured.description: Administrative zone within the parish where the household is located.

variableMeasured.name: income_level
variableMeasured.description: Income level of the household's study area as classified in the study design; ordered factor with levels low < middle < high.

variableMeasured.name: occupants
variableMeasured.description: Number of people living in the household during the 7-day waste collection period.

variableMeasured.name: age_head
variableMeasured.description: Age of the household head in years; ordered factor with levels 18-35 < 36-60 < >60.

variableMeasured.name: gender_head
variableMeasured.description: Gender of the household head (Female or Male).

variableMeasured.name: education_head
variableMeasured.description: Highest education level of the household head; ordered factor with levels Illiterate < Primary < Secondary < Tertiary.

variableMeasured.name: profession_head
variableMeasured.description: Profession of the household head (Business, Government employee, Housewife, Private employee, or Retired).

variableMeasured.name: monthly_income_ugx
variableMeasured.description: Monthly household income band in Uganda shillings (UGX); ordered factor with levels <500,000 < 500,000-1,000,000 < 1,000,000-3,000,000 < >3,000,000.

variableMeasured.name: respondent
variableMeasured.description: Household member who answered the questionnaire (Household head, Spouse, Son/daughter, or Niece/nephew).

variableMeasured.name: period_of_stay
variableMeasured.description: How long the household has lived at the premises; ordered factor with levels <1 year < 1-3 years < 3-5 years < >5 years.

variableMeasured.name: occupancy
variableMeasured.description: Occupancy status of the premises (Occupied by owner or Rented).

variableMeasured.name: housing_quality
variableMeasured.description: Type of dwelling as a proxy for housing quality (Bungalow, Story building, or Temporary).

variableMeasured.name: roof_material
variableMeasured.description: Main roof material of the dwelling (Cemented, Iron sheets, Iron sheets/tiles, or Tiles); Bwaise I recorded only the combined Iron sheets/tiles category.

variableMeasured.name: wall_material
variableMeasured.description: Main wall material of the dwelling (Bricks, Concrete blocks, or Mud/poles).

variableMeasured.name: floor_material
variableMeasured.description: Main floor material of the dwelling (Cemented, Mud, or Tiles).

variableMeasured.name: water_access
variableMeasured.description: Main drinking water access of the household (House connection, Stand pipe, or Yard tap).

variableMeasured.name: sanitation_facility
variableMeasured.description: Whether the household's sanitation facility is shared with other households (Shared facilities or Not shared facilities).

variableMeasured.name: road_condition
variableMeasured.description: Condition of the access road to the household (Paved or Unpaved).

variableMeasured.name: waste_food_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of food waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_garden_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of garden waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_wood_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of wood waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_textiles_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of textile waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_paper_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of paper waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_polythene_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of polythene waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_plastics_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of plastic waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_glass_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of glass waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_metals_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of metal waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category); for Ggaba Household_7 the value 2.674 was stored as text in the raw sheet and is excluded from that household's recorded waste_total_kg.

variableMeasured.name: waste_other_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mass of waste not covered by the other nine categories, generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms (ASTM waste category).

variableMeasured.name: waste_total_kg
variableMeasured.description: Total mass of waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in kilograms, as recorded in the raw sheet (SUM of the ten category columns).

variableMeasured.name: waste_per_day_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mean daily mass of waste generated by the household, in kilograms per day (waste_total_kg divided by 7).

variableMeasured.name: waste_per_capita_kg
variableMeasured.description: Mean daily mass of waste generated per household member, in kilograms per person per day (waste_per_day_kg divided by occupants).

variableMeasured.name: volume_l
variableMeasured.description: Volume of the waste generated by the household over the 7-day collection period, in litres.

variableMeasured.name: density_kg_l
variableMeasured.description: Bulk density of the generated waste, in kilograms per litre; multiply by 1000 for kg/m3 as reported in the manuscript.
